// // This submodule checks if two inputs are not equal
module top_comparator_module(
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    output reg equal);always @(*) begin
        if (a == b) begin
            equal <= 1;
        end else begin
            equal <= 0;
        end
    end

endmodule
